question: Do processed meats significantly increase colon cancer risk?
topic: Addresses a major but under-recognized dietary cancer risk with clear evidence from health authoriti

sources.name: IARC Monographs on the Identification of Carcinogenic Hazards to Humans - Red Meat and Processed Meat — WHO/IARC
Diet and Physical Activity: What's the Cancer Connection? — American Cancer Society
Diet, Nutrition, Physical Activity and Cancer: A Global Perspective - Continuous Update Project Expert Report 2018 — World Cancer Research Fund
Chemicals in Meat Cooked at High Temperatures and Cancer Risk — NIH National Cancer Institute
Red meat and processed meat consumption and risk of incident coronary heart disease, stroke, and diabetes mellitus — Cochrane Library

discovery_sources.text: Cancer Research: Most Americans don’t know this food raises colon cancer risk
